label: Causal, masked & structured masking

node.label: Causal, masked & structured masking
node.definition: Visibility constraints define which positions or features can interact or must be predicted.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Causal, masked & structured masking is to connect Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units, Sequences, events & time series to downstream capabilities including Encoder–decoder transformers, Decoder-only causal transformers, Joint-embedding predictive architectures.
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units, Sequences, events & time series.

dependencies.rationale: Causal, masked & structured masking uses Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Causal, masked & structured masking uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Causal, masked & structured masking uses Images, video & spatial grids as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Visibility constraints define which positions or features can interact or must be predicted.

The role of Causal, masked & structured masking is to connect Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units, Sequences, events & time series to downstream capabilities including Encoder–decoder transformers, Decoder-only causal transformers, Joint-embedding predictive architectures.

Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units, Sequences, events & time series.
Causal, masked & structured masking uses Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

Causal, masked & structured masking uses Images, video & spatial grids as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
